title: shard tender command failed - shard-review site doesn't exist in folk-protocol SKEIN. Unable to c...
content: shard tender command failed - shard-review site doesn't exist in folk-protocol SKEIN. Unable to complete standard shard workflow (tender → review → merge). Workaround: manual commit + completion. Friction: agents working in shards can't signal 'ready for review' via SKEIN.
